dct_title_s: Coste Occidentale d'Afrique, depuis le Xie. Dégré de latitude méridionale jusqu'au Cap de Bonne Espérance
dct_description_sm: Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian
Prime meridian: "Longitude de l'Isle de Fer"
Shows the south of Africa from the Cape of Good Hope to about 11° and coastlines of today's South Africa, Namibia, and Angola
Includes a decorative title cartouche and compass rose
